tsc.web: pre-existing TS2578 in formatWaitingTime.test.ts only (unchanged on main, unrelated)

notes:
Sprint 3D — Gaffer CRM UI polish to match docs/mockups/gaffer-crm.html 1:1. Covers 9 items: dashboard rebuild, project detail polish, contact card polish, layout month chip, seed scripts, summary API endpoints, and 4 review-fix follow-ups.

1st round review (commit 40b503d):
- Product ACCEPTED with 3 concerns (2 scope gaps, 1 cosmetic).
- Technical REQUEST_CHANGES with 1 Important (duplicate payment risk: PaymentForm state not reset after successful submit since refactor to <details> removed implicit unmount).

Fixes applied in commit 3840c0d:
- PaymentForm + AddMemberForm: reset state via useRef<HTMLDetailsElement> + removeAttribute('open') on success, inside try block before onDone() (error path preserves input for retry).
- Added project-header 3-col money-block (Сумма / Должны мне / Должен я) on /gaffer/projects/[id] to match mockup screen 04 line 1283–1286.
- Replaced '—' with '+ выпл.' <Link> to /gaffer/projects/{projectId} on team-member contact card non-closed mp-rows (screen 06 fidelity).
- Removed leading '+ ' from <details> summary labels to avoid double-+ (span toggle already provides +/−).

2nd round technical re-review: APPROVE. All 6 targeted checks passed. 705/705 API tests green.

Server extension: getContactDebtSummary now returns recentPayments (last 10 IN for CLIENT / OUT for TEAM_MEMBER) with tenant-safe filter via project.gafferUserId nested relation — verified by tech reviewer.

Design canon: IBM Plex + semantic tokens only, no raw hex introduced. All money values use .mono-num, all labels Russian, all status pills use existing StatusPill variants.
